title: Iosefa v Tealofi [2023] TVHC 9; Civil Case 8 of 2023 (11 December 2023)
text:
Iosefa v Tealofi [2023] TVHC 9; Civil Case 8 of 2023 (11 December 2023)
IN THE HIGH COURT OF TUVALU 2023
CIVIL CASE NO. 8/23
BETWEEN
MATANILE IOSEFA
APPLICANT
AND
MATAI TEALOFI
ERIC TEALOFI
RESPONDENTS
Before	 The Hon Judge John Muria
Hearing	 20
th
November 2023
Mr C Kausea for Applicant
JUDGMENT IN DEFAULT
Having read the application for Default Judgment together with the Writ of Summons, Statement of Claim and Affidavit of Service of
the Writ of Summons and Statement of Claim on the defendant and there being no appearance entered for or by the defendant IT IS HEREBY
ORDERED that Judgment in default of appearance be entered for the plaintiff in the sum of $30,953.66 for special damages and such
sum to be assessed for general damages.
Dated on the 11
th
day of December 2023.
Sir John Muria
Judge
